title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Axis Bank

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Axis Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Axis Bank! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Axis Bank:
Axis Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Axis Bank!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
